subject: number of small improvements made in SLI
commit_message:
number of small improvements made in SLI


CallNodeExecutor had a looping issue for rare cases
SetNodeExecutor can now use expressions in the left hand side
WhileNode support added
jsonStringToCtx added to SliPluginUtils

Issue-ID: SDNC-70
Change-Id: I2d4f32a589e4fcbef34121270ccaaac6ea424a77
Signed-off-by: Kevin Smokowski <ks6305@att.com>
